# Ewan Croft

Full-stack developer, poet, and pagan building tools for the AT Protocol ecosystem, esoteric language compilers, and self-hosted infrastructure.

## Overview

I focus on AT Protocol (ATProto) ecosystem development, digital sovereignty, and self-hosting. My work bridges the gap between legacy social platforms and the open social web.

## Primary Repositories

- [ewanc26/pkgs](https://github.com/ewanc26/pkgs): Monorepo for ATProto tools (Malachite, Opal, Jasper, Bismuth, Tourmaline).
- [ewanc26/website](https://github.com/ewanc26/website): SvelteKit-based personal site powered by ATProto.
- [ewanc26/nix](https://github.com/ewanc26/nix): NixOS configurations for desktop and laptop hosts.
- [ewanc26/atpkt](https://github.com/ewanc26/atpkt): Kotlin AT Protocol SDK (Ktor, kotlinx.serialization).
- [ewanc26/esoterica](https://github.com/ewanc26/esoterica): Rust framework for generating constructed languages (conlangs).
- [ewanc26/digital-person](https://github.com/ewanc26/digital-person): Letta agent template for human online presence.
- [ewanc26/inkwell](https://github.com/ewanc26/inkwell): iOS client for Standard.site (AT Protocol).
- [ewanc26/inkwell-android](https://github.com/ewanc26/inkwell-android): Android client for Standard.site (AT Protocol).

## Key ATProto Tools

- **Malachite**: Last.fm/Spotify/Apple Music/YouTube Music → Teal.fm (music history).
- **Opal**: Twitter/Mastodon/Threads/Nostr → Bluesky (microblog history).
- **Jasper**: Instagram → Grain/Spark (photo/video history).
- **Bismuth**: Standard.site (richtext-block) → Markdown.
- **Tourmaline**: Teal.fm scrobble analyser & listener profile generator.
- **atpkt**: Kotlin AT Protocol SDK (Ktor, kotlinx.serialization).
- **atproto-mcp-server**: MCP server for Bluesky/AT Protocol interactions.
- **svelte-standard-site**: Standard.site publication renderer for SvelteKit.
- **eurosky-social-app**: eurosky fork of Bluesky Social app.
- **cleanfollow-bsky**: Hidden accounts unfollow tool for Bluesky.
- **moonstone**: Experimental PDS in Rust (WIP).

## Compilers & Esoteric Languages

- **selenium**: Lunar/poetic syntax, strong typing, compiles to C.
- **numlang**: Stack-based, numbers + punctuation only, compiles to C.
- **sigi**: Pure symbolic stack language, all punctuation, compiles to C.
- **esoterica**: Rust framework for generating constructed languages (conlangs).

## Bots & Automation

- **bluesky-moon-tracker**: Daily moon phase posts (Rust, atrium-rs).
- **bluesky-awoo-bot**: Wolf sounds on Bluesky.
- **bluesky-markov**: Markov chain bot for Bluesky.
- **bluesky-gradient**: Gradient profile banner generator.
- **bluesky-avatar-updater**: Scheduled avatar updates.
- **bluesky-ollama**: LLM-generated posts via Ollama.
- **mastodon-markov**: Markov chain bot for Mastodon.

## Infrastructure

- **nix-starter**: Starter NixOS configs — TUI laptop and hardened server.
- **nix**: NixOS configurations for desktop and laptop hosts.
- **docsite**: Sequoia-powered documentation site.
- **devlog**: Automated changelog published to AT Protocol.
- **pkgs**: Monorepo — 16+ TypeScript packages, 1 Rust, 1 Python.

## Tech Stack

**Languages**: TypeScript, Kotlin, Swift, Python, Rust, C, Nix, Shell.
**Frameworks**: SvelteKit, Svelte 5, Tailwind CSS 4, Godot 4.6.
**Tools**: pnpm, NixOS, Caddy, AT Protocol lexicons.

## Design Philosophy

Catppuccin-inspired forest-green palette with terminal aesthetics. Typography centers on Inter and JetBrains Mono. Emphasis on privacy (browser-based tools) and data ownership.

## Cultural Context

- **Heritage**: Anglo-Scottish.
- **Language**: Learning Scottish Gaelic (Gàidhlig na h-Alba).
- **Spirituality**: Pagan, following the Wheel of the Year.
- **Identity**: Lycanthropy/werewolf — persistent identity theme.
- **Music**: Powerwolf Top 0.03% globally.

- **DID**: `did:plc:ofrbh253gwicbkc5nktqepol`
- **Handle**: `ewancroft.uk`
- **PDS**: `eurosky.social`
- **Code hosting**: GitHub (ewanc26) · Tangled (ewancroft.uk)
